testimonials.title: Claire Hoffman
testimonials.content: After months of searching on our own, we reached out and found our dream home in under three weeks. Patient, knowledgeable and never pushy — exactly what a first-time buyer needs.

meta.headline: Found our dream home in three weeks

testimonials.title: Ben Okafor
testimonials.content: Our home sold above the asking price in four days. The pricing strategy was spot on, the photography was stunning, and we had multiple offers before the weekend.

meta.headline: Sold above asking price in four days

testimonials.title: Fatima Al-Rashid
testimonials.content: Moving to a new city is stressful enough without a complicated home search. Every question was answered promptly and the whole process felt smooth and well-managed from start to finish.

testimonials.title: Jerome Petit
testimonials.content: We had a tight budget and a long list of requirements. Instead of showing us properties outside our range, we got honest advice and found a home that ticked every box.

testimonials.title: Alice Yamamoto
testimonials.content: The listing was live within a week, beautifully presented and marketed across every channel. Viewings were managed professionally and we accepted an offer well above what we expected.

testimonials.title: Rafael Moreno
testimonials.content: This was our third home purchase and by far the smoothest experience. Responsive, thorough and always working in our interest — we would not use anyone else for our next move.

meta.headline: The best agent we've ever worked with
